creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Diomidis Spinellis from comment #2)

!Ports committers can commit to ports with a ports committer review/approval, and are encouraged to. Please self-assign and open a review @ Phabricator or have a ports reviewer review/approve it here (with the maintainer-approval attachment flag)

This change needs QA (poudriere) confirmation at least
